hero.title: Oak Video Editor
hero.subtitle: A free, open-source, cross-platform non-linear video editor. Community-maintained for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Video editing tools built for creators

nonlinear.title: Non-linear Editing
nonlinear.desc: Powerful timeline and multi-track editing with cuts, compositing, and fine adjustments.

color.title: Color Grading & Scopes
color.desc: Professional color tools including LUTs, histograms, and waveform monitors.

openfx.title: OpenFX Plugins
openfx.desc: Load OpenFX plugins to extend your creative possibilities.
